_comment: FROZEN ANCHOR (BUILD-SPEC §15, Invariant 9). Hand-blessed; edited only by the owner, on purpose, logged. Never auto-modified by any agent. Queries run against the synthetic fixture corpus in ./corpus (NOT the owner's private vault, which changes and is private). 'expected' titles are corpus filenames without .md. k is the retrieval depth scored.

queries.query: how can I calm down and fall asleep when my mind keeps racing at night
tips for growing vegetables in my backyard garden
how do I save money each month and build an emergency fund
I want to start practicing a musical instrument as a beginner
what should I pack and prepare for a long mountain hike
